code: const BASE_URL="http://localhost:5000/api";/* AUTH */export const signup=async data=>{const res=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/auth/signup`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(data)});return res.json();};export const login=async data=>{const res=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/auth/login`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(data)});return res.json();};/* SCORES */export const getScores=async token=>{const res=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/scores`,{headers:{Authorization:token}});return res.json();};export const addScore=async(score,token)=>{await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/scores/add`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Authorization:token},body:JSON.stringify({score})});};/* CHARITY */export const getCharities=async()=>{const res=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/charity`);return res.json();};export const selectCharity=async(charity,token)=>{await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/charity/select`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Authorization:token},body:JSON.stringify({charity})});};/* DRAW */export const runDraw=async token=>{const res=await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/draw/run`,{headers:{Authorization:token}});return res.json();};
